command.insertPhotos: Insert photos from Immich for this day
settings.serverUrl.name: Server URL
settings.serverUrl.desc: Base URL of your Immich server (e.g., https://immich.example.com:8443)
settings.apiKey.name: API key
settings.apiKey.desc: API key for authentication. Requires asset.read and asset.view permissions. Note: stored in plaintext in plugin data (Obsidian standard).
settings.testConnection.name: Test connection
settings.testConnection.desc: Verify server connectivity and API key permissions
settings.testConnection.successNoScope: Connected, but could not verify scope (empty library). Ensure API key has asset.read and asset.view permissions.
settings.testConnection.failNetwork: Network error. Check server URL, VPN, and Tailscale connection.
settings.testConnection.failUnauthorized: Authentication failed. Check your API key.
settings.testConnection.failForbidden: Access denied. API key requires asset.read and asset.view permissions.
settings.insertPosition.name: Insert position
settings.insertPosition.desc: Where selected photos are inserted into the note.
settings.maxEdgePx.name: Maximum edge length (px)
settings.maxEdgePx.desc: Maximum length of the longest edge when resizing (no upscaling). Default: 800
settings.jpegQuality.name: JPEG quality
settings.attachmentFolder.name: Attachment folder
settings.attachmentFolder.desc: Folder path for downloaded images. Supports {{year}}, {{month}}, {{date}} placeholders. Default: attachments/immich/{{year}}/
settings.fileNameTemplate.name: File name template
settings.fileNameTemplate.desc: Template for image file names. Variables: {{date}}, {{assetIdShort}}. Default: {{date}}_immich_{{assetIdShort}}
settings.photoEmbed.name: Photo embed
settings.photoEmbed.desc: How each photo is inserted. Choose Custom template for full control over the inserted block.
settings.markdownTemplate.name: Custom template
settings.markdownTemplate.desc: Template for the inserted block. Lines that would render empty are omitted. Variables: {{localPath}} (for markdown links), {{localPathRaw}} (for wikilinks), {{immichUrl}}, {{altText}}, {{description}}, {{time}}, {{date}}, {{city}}, {{country}}, {{camera}}, {{people}}, {{filename}}
settings.titleDateFormat.name: Title date format
settings.titleDateFormat.desc: Moment.js format for parsing date from file name. Default: YYYY-MM-DD
settings.frontmatterField.name: Frontmatter fallback field
settings.frontmatterField.desc: Frontmatter field to extract date from if not found in file name (e.g., created, date). Leave empty to disable.
settings.gridCols.name: Grid columns
settings.gridCols.desc: Number of columns in the photo grid, on desktop and mobile. Default: 3
settings.language.name: Language
settings.language.desc: UI language override. Default: Auto (detected from Obsidian)
modal.title: Photos from {{date}}
modal.empty: No photos found for this day.
modal.errorNetwork: Network error. Check VPN/Tailscale connection and server URL.
modal.errorUnauthorized: Authentication failed. Check your API key.
modal.errorForbidden: Access denied. API key requires asset.read and asset.view permissions.
modal.notConfigured: The plugin is not configured yet. Set the server URL and API key first.
notice.noActiveFile: Open a note first — there is nothing to insert photos into.
